title: Here are the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 and Z Fold 8 camera and battery specs, apparently - Engadget
summary: Camera upgrades in the Z Flip 8, Fold 8 and Fold 8 Ultra appear to be slim. Last year's Fold 7 featured a three-lens rear setup with a 200MP main camera, 12MP ultrawide and 10MP telephoto.
